rows.description: Summa Rcd Receptionum cum Deb: Praecedentis anni
rows.notes: This line was incorrectly split by gemini-flash into two rows (its row 5 and 6). Consolidated and confirmed visually as a single total line. Description combines best elements: 'Rcd' from gemini-flash (over 'total' from gpt-5-mini), 'Praecedentis' from gemini-flash (over 'praedicti' from gpt-5-mini).
